items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a retainage release trigger upon 100% completion. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions a retainage release but lacks specific details or evidence to substantiate that the system correctly implements this requirement, leading to an inconclusive validation.
